description.en: Query the server’s capabilities as specified in RFC 2449. Returns a dictionary in the form {'name': ['param'...]}. Added in version 3.4.

excerpt.es: Query the server’s capabilities as specified in RFC 2449. Returns a dictionary in the form {'name': ['param'...]}. Added in version 3.4.
